Legends don't do things by halves — tell us your idea!

### What problem does this solve?
Why do we need this for Open Origin?

### Proposed solution
How should it work? Be specific — no shortcuts.

### Alternatives considered

### Which part of the framework?

- [ ] Routing Logic
- [ ] Agent Orchestration
- [ ] Security / QA
